title: Pin @types/vscode to match extension engine range

source.subject: chore(deps): pin @types/vscode to 1.88.0 to satisfy engines.vscode

body:
## Outcome

Pin @types/vscode to 1.88.0 to satisfy engines.vscode.

## Context

- Workstream **editor-extension** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).
- Open VSX matrix includes **darwin-arm64** and **darwin-x64** with cross-built Intel LSP where needed.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid_vscode`
- **Commit:** [`714871c`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_vscode/commit/714871c) — chore(deps): pin @types/vscode to 1.88.0 to satisfy engines.vscode
